<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Esperanto; use Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Pattern; use Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Substitution; use Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Transformation; use Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Word; class Inflectible { /** @return Transformation[] */ public static function getSingular(): iterable { yield new Transformation(new Pattern('oj$'), 'o'); } /** @return Transformation[] */ public static function getPlural(): iterable { yield new Transformation(new Pattern('o$'), 'oj'); } /** @return Substitution[] */ public static function getIrregular(): iterable { yield new Substitution(new Word(''), new Word('')); } }
